rulings.Case Title: TODD MARINCHAK VS. SPARKS FAMILY TRUST DATED JULY 5,2004 A TRUST et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Compel Arb And To Stay Proceedings In Pending Action
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, April 28, 2009, line 11, DEFENDANTS WILLIAM AARSHEIM, Q SURGICAL, LLC, AND CRAIG SPARKS Petition To Compel Arbitration And To Stay Proceedings In Pending Action. MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION DENIED. DEFENDANT HAS WAIVED THE RIGHT TO ARBITRATE. THERE IS A SIGNIFICANT RISK OF INCONSISTENT RULINGS. =(302/CWW/PB)

rulings.Case Title: MARGARET SUE KAUFMAN VS. ROBIN GOLDMAN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, April 28, 2009, line 12, DEFENDANT ROBIN GOLDMAN'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO ANSWER. GROUNDS FOR DEMURRER NOT SEPARATELY STATED (CRC 3.1320(c)). NO PROPER BASIS STATED FOR DEMURRER (CCP SECTIONS 430.10, 430.60). BASIS FOR DEMURRER NOT GROUNDED UPON DEFECTS THAT APPEAR ON THE FACE OF THE COMPLAINT, RATHER THE ENFORCEABILITY OF THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. =(302/CWW/JW)
